assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.read' scope is defined using RequireClaim
assertions.rationale: The code defines a policy with RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.read").

assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.write' scope is defined using RequireClaim
assertions.rationale: The code defines a policy with RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.write").

assertions.assertion: The GET /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the read policy
assertions.rationale: The GET /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization("CatalogRead") which references the read scope policy.

assertions.assertion: The POST /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the write policy
assertions.rationale: The POST /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization("CatalogWrite") which references the write scope policy.

assertions.assertion: builder.Services.AddAuthorization is called to register the policies
